profile.name: JN Developer Studio
profile.bio: Focused on creating fast, responsive, offline-friendly web experiences with clean interfaces and maintainable vanilla JavaScript.

highlights.title: Static Architecture
highlights.body: Builds fast web products using simple files, predictable data, and no framework lock-in.

highlights.title: Premium Interfaces
highlights.body: Designs smooth, tactile layouts with clear hierarchy, calm motion, and mobile-first ergonomics.

highlights.title: Offline Reliability
highlights.body: Uses PWA caching patterns so core content remains available even when the network drops.
